summary: Contact visibility feature tested successfully. Backend correctly strips phone/email for non-privileged roles (GM, CRE, Planning). Privileged roles (Super Admin, Sales, Pre-Sales) always see contact info. Frontend conditionally renders phone/email only when data exists.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact visibility implementation is clean and well-structured in /app/backend/core/contact_visibility.py
Frontend components (REProjectsPage, CREBoard, GMDashboard) correctly use conditional rendering for phone/email fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact visibility feature is working correctly. Privileged roles (super_admin, sales, pre_sales) always see phone/email. Non-privileged roles have contacts stripped UNLESS the project is converted AND linked to a project with accountant_verified=true. Backend tests in test_contact_visibility.py verify the API responses. Frontend conditionally renders phone/email fields using pattern: {data.client_phone && (...)}

backend_api_stripping./api/crm/re-projects: PASS - Strips contacts for non-privileged roles
backend_api_stripping./api/crm/sales/leads: PASS - Strips contacts for non-privileged roles
backend_api_stripping./api/cre/new-deals: PASS - Strips contacts for CRE role

frontend_conditional_rendering.CREBoard.jsx: PASS - Line 455 conditionally renders phone on deal cards

test_evidence.sales_crm_screenshot: Sales role correctly sees 4 phone icons with numbers (6383145061, 123456789, etc.)
test_evidence.cre_board_screenshot: CRE role correctly sees 0 phone icons - contacts stripped
test_evidence.gm_dashboard_dialog: GM role project detail dialog shows NO phone/email fields
